kernel=Image
arm_64bit=1
enable_uart=1
gpu_mem=128
# Force 1080p60 on HDMI; prevents mode cycling when no DSI display is attached
hdmi_force_hotplug=1
hdmi_group=1
hdmi_mode=16
disable_overscan=1
dtoverlay=vc4-fkms-v3d
# Codec Zero (I2S DAC/ADC, DA7212)
dtparam=audio=off
dtparam=i2c_arm=on
dtparam=i2s=on
dtoverlay=rpi-codeczero
# Footswitches + encoder (compiled from ardor-controls.dts)
dtoverlay=ardor-controls
